2238770.name: EaseUS RecExperts
2238770.description:
EaseUS RecExperts: The All-in-One Screen Recorder for Steam Gameplay



EaseUS RecExperts is a powerful screen recorder that can capture any region on your PC screen, audio, and webcam. It's perfect for recording Steam gameplay, tutorials, webinars, and more.

Here are some of the critical features of EaseUS RecExperts:

Record any region on your PC screen: You can record the entire screen, a specific window, or a custom region.
Record gameplay with audio and webcam: Record your Steam gameplay with high-quality audio and webcam footage.
No lag or time limit: Record your gameplay without lag or a time limit.
Embedded video editor and media player: EaseUS RecExperts includes a built-in video editor and media player, so you can edit and watch your recordings immediately.
Advanced AI-powered noise remover: Remove background noise from your recordings with the advanced AI-powered noise remover.
Video enhancer for 4K/8K videos: Enhance the quality of your 4K/8K videos with the video enhancer.
Auto recording & audio extractor: Automatically record your screen or extract audio from your recordings.
EaseUS RecExperts is a powerful, easy-to-use screen recorder perfect for recording Steam gameplay. With its advanced features, you can create high-quality recordings to share with others.

Download EaseUS RecExperts today and start recording your Steam gameplay!
2238770.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 繁体中文, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 韩语
